caption: Don’t worry about connecting those live cables into your metal socket….😬😱
Don’t worry about earthing the steel wired armoured cable. Just lash it in and hope for the best! 🙄😬
Excellent use of of push fit plumbing elbow joint….🙄
They may have used a slightly too big drill bit for this earthing. Never mind, leaving a huge whole was nice of them. The weather and mice really appreciate it….🙄
